detail: Distilled the public Deli AutoResearch thread into the active no-anchor loop: state files, ready-means-execute, honest score drops, proposer/opponent separation, and structural pivots after stale loops. Pulled the strict source-retention group probe from h100-test-3; even with max_candidates_per_source=20 and top_k up to 16 it produced only two candidates, confirming single-tracklet relinks are too low-mass. Next direction is grouped/component relinking around MCAM04/MCAM08 using source-retention as an admission gate.

Added no_anchor_conflict_outlier_group_relink.py. Strict grouping produced 0 groups from 21 candidates; relaxed source_target grouping produced 3 groups / 6 relinks, but eval-only audit showed top group 29->11 moved seqs 3727 and 7845 that were neither source-top nor target-top GT. External canonical full-score of top1 was IDF1 0.653293 / HOTA 0.517126 / AssA 0.532779, below standing 0.655378. Pivot from conflict-outlier grouping to target-fragment or local-track continuity positive mining.

Applied Deli AutoResearch protocol to the next no-anchor branch. MCAM04/08 strict temporal continuity found 0 edges; ultrawide temporal found 1 edge but full-score was IDF1 0.653210 / HOTA 0.517030 / AssA 0.532678. Patched target-fragment sweep to sort by no-GT selection_score; top selection merged 5 small fragments and improved proxy pair F1 to 0.769406, but canonical full-score was IDF1 0.653220 / HOTA 0.517042 / AssA 0.532691, below standing best 0.655378. Pivot to delivery side-effect critic plus source split/quarantine.

Ran current-k3 clothing/conflict quarantine. Pair-only sweep found no-op at threshold 0.45, a safe 1-node split at threshold 0.55 with unchanged pair F1 0.769367, and 6-node split at threshold 0.65 with pair F1 drop to 0.769130. Canonical full-score of the 1-node split was IDF1 0.653242 / HOTA 0.517070 / AssA 0.532728, below standing best 0.655378. Conservative quarantine should stay as an admission/safety primitive, not primary improvement axis.

Converted the three new refutations into no-anchor full-score critic labels and retrained the compact ridge full-proxy model. Dataset now has 80 deduplicated rows / 45 features, but LOOCV remains weak (corr -0.032403, MAE 0.012658), so row-summary features are not reliable enough to rank production candidates. Next opponent needs counter-target crop-pair evidence, per-video namespace delta features, and detector/unmatched-FP predictors.

summary: Added opponent feature schema and scheduler/proxy support; visual-only accepted 1 compact edge but temporal opponent rejected it, leaving zero candidates to materialize. No e2e score change; standing best remains 0.655378.

detail: Clamped postfilter proxy r1-6 proposed ranks 49/52/56, but raw IDF1 was 0.652866/0.652973/0.652170 and density_simple source-zip IDF1 was 0.655037/0.655140/0.654343, all below best 0.655817. Added as hard negatives; r1-9 strict scheduler selected 0 above-current candidates.

On current-best rank01 source zip, density_simple/density_oracle_lite/confidence_tail scored IDF1 0.655817/0.655810/0.655800. Delivery policy alone does not improve the standing best; pivot to structural component/source side-effect critic.

True softcut split accepted one component / 162 tracklets and reduced cannot-link conflicts 44->34, but pair F1 fell to 0.766079, raw IDF1 to 0.649324, and density_simple source-zip IDF1 to 0.651408. Standing best remains 0.655817; pivot to target-local continuity relabel.

Local continuity branch did not improve current best. local_track relink touched 0 groups even with permissive settings. Video-temporal probe had 729 rows but only 18 accepted-edge rows, each one edge; the full-scored MCAM08 one-edge edit had raw IDF1 0.653709 and density_simple IDF1 0.655817, exactly tying the standing best. Pivot to candidate recall expansion.

Added no_anchor_endpoint_component_relink_sweep.py. MCAM04/08 smoke had 1 candidate; all-video smoke had 5 candidates. Top no-GT endpoint edge moved singleton seq1604 into component 11 with visual 0.849789 and strong geometry, but pair F1 fell to 0.770738, raw IDF1 to 0.653707, and density_simple to 0.655815, below standing 0.655817. Keep as candidate source; add opponent/referee.

Audited endpoint candidates: 2 local-true endpoints landed inside impure target components and 1 support_edges=1 endpoint was false. Deduplicated micro-surgery full-score rejected direct materialization: best pair F1 rose to 0.770956, but full IDF1/HOTA/AssA was 0.653731/0.517546/0.532996, below standing 0.655817/0.519228/0.534791. Pivot: endpoint evidence should feed referee/scheduler features, not direct global-id assignment edits.

Patched no_anchor_fullscore_scheduler.py to use action_signature as a family key and to add endpoint direct-action side-effect risk. Scheduler guard over endpoint micro-surgery JSON rejected 100/100 rows, selected 0, and tagged top endpoint actions with large_target_component, endpoint_direct_action, and endpoint_large_target_component; known full IDF1 remained below best.

Global pool exhausted after broad/global hard negatives. Tiny-local top1 component 21->0 moved 8 seqs and scored raw IDF1 0.654461; density_oracle_lite/simple/confidence_tail scored 0.654603/0.654608/0.654504, all below best 0.655817. FaceNet weak calibration shows face max 0.766 is auxiliary only. Next proposer should build identity-component evidence cards and split impure target components before direct merges.

Strict multiview target-split found no accepted splits; aggressive no-GT evidence cards split 455-tracklet mass-heavy and 237-tracklet single-best actions. Full IDF1 was 0.653405 and 0.653781; density_simple single-best was 0.653924. Standing best remains 0.655817.

Moved two-tracklet small part [8888,9282] from component 5 to no-GT nearest target component 38. Pair F1 unchanged at 0.770741 but full IDF1 0.653718, below best 0.655817. Mark component rearrangement path stale; pivot to new evidence source or detector admission.

Deli-style pivot from stale component rearrangement to detector admission produced a small no-anchor production improvement. area800 on the current best density_simple source zip scored IDF1/HOTA/AssA 0.655855/0.519271/0.534837, dropping 1404 rows. global_conf015, video_p01_conf, area600/700/900/1000/1200 did not beat area800. Pair/global-ID model remains >70; e2e remains below 0.70.
next_direction: use area800 as a postfilter while generating new detector-level tracklet admission or identity evidence for MCAM04 Tc6, MCAM06 Tc6, and MCAM03 Tc8.

detail: Per-video bbox area quantile detector admission improved the no-anchor e2e best from 0.655855 to 0.655911. p0.5% is best among tested p0.1/p0.2/p0.3/p0.5/p0.75/p1.0. It drops 7603 rows and keeps pair/global-ID model unchanged; e2e remains below 0.70.
next_direction: freeze p0.5 per-video area admission as a postfilter and search for new identity or detector-tracklet evidence in MCAM04 Tc6, MCAM06 Tc6, and MCAM03 Tc8.

detail: Added --only-videos to the no-anchor per-video filter oracle and ran a weak-video area upper-bound diagnostic on the current p0.5% promoted submission. Target videos MCAM03 Tc8, MCAM04 Tc6, and MCAM06 Tc6 all selected area_q=0; additional area pruning improved DetPr/unmatched FP but reduced DetRe and IDF1. Combined oracle score remained IDF1/HOTA/AssA 0.655911/0.519311/0.534922 with zero extra dropped rows. Close extra weak-video area admission; pivot to detector/tracklet regeneration or crop-level evidence extraction for weak videos.

Added a BoTSORT sample preparer that attaches eval-only tracklet_majority_gt_id by frame-level IoU and writes crop+bbox feature NPZ without anchors. BoTSORT sample prepare produced 2406 tracklets, 2049 eval-labeled tracklets, eval purity mean/p10 0.871573/0.555003, and 513 missing crop-cache rows. Same weak crop+bbox no-anchor sweep scored best identity F1 0.191162 and pair F1 0.032079, essentially matching the prior GT-box weak-feature upper-bound pair F1 0.032319. Refute better-boxes-plus-same-weak-evidence as a path to 0.70; pivot to stronger crop/person identity evidence before further graph policy work.

Patched BoTSORT sample OSNet extractor to map hash-suffixed video keys back to raw video keys, extracted OSNet+color features for 2406/2406 tracklets with zero missing videos/crops, and ran a no-anchor BoTSORT sample sweep. Best identity F1/pair F1 improved from weak-feature 0.191162/0.032079 to OSNet+color 0.380024/0.253572 with pair precision/recall 0.315609/0.211916. Positive but incomplete: continue with GT-box OSNet/color upper-bound and NFC/metric transforms; DS1 e2e remains below target at 0.655911.

GT-box OSNet+color extraction succeeded for 1887/1887 tracklets with zero missing video/crop, but no-anchor sample sweep scored identity F1/pair F1 0.272212/0.095926, below BoTSORT OSNet 0.380024/0.253572. Feature retrieval diagnostic: GT-box AP/AUC 0.098062/0.623248, cross-video top-45 hit recall 0.905670 but top-positive beating top-negative only 0.255962; BoTSORT AP/AUC 0.306367/0.846629 and positive margin fraction 0.656101. NFC k8 slightly improved pair F1 to 0.255158 but lowered identity F1 to 0.372728; k16 degraded. Next: multi-prototype OSNet crop aggregation and weak pair scorer.

Extended the no-anchor sample OSNet extractor to save features_osnet_std and features_color_std dispersion blocks while keeping the existing mean feature blocks unchanged. No score change claimed; next experiment should rerun extraction and sweep mean+std or prototype-aware weak pair scoring.

Read the Deli AutoResearch framework, papers page, self-play story, related bilevel autoresearch abstract, and autoresearch guardrail note. Updated the no-anchor VLINCS loop contract: durable state, proposer/referee/opponent/executor/result-gate separation, honest score drops, reviewer-persona checks, strict no-anchor production evidence, and structural pivot after stale threshold loops. Applied to the current sample evidence branch: close GT-box 3-sample mean OSNet and simple NFC as main routes; next experiment must rerun mean+std or prototype-aware weak pair scoring before DS1 insertion.

Extracted five-crop BoTSORT sample OSNet/color features with mean and std blocks for 2406/2406 tracklets, then ran no-anchor sample sweeps. Best sample identity F1 improved from prior BoTSORT OSNet/color s3 0.380024 to 0.461553; best sample pair F1/P/R improved from 0.253572/0.315609/0.211916 to 0.360210/0.435531/0.307100. This promotes S5 mean/std evidence but remains far below 0.70, and scalar std-weight sweeps show diminishing returns. Pivot structurally to prototype-aware pair scoring rather than more std-threshold tuning. No anchors used; GT labels are eval-only; DS1 e2e best remains 0.655911.

Tested prototype-aware OSNet evidence after the S5 mean/std promotion. Extractor now saves per-crop prototype tensors and sample/global pair-feature loaders can consume both slot-vector views and 3D all-cross prototype views. Both prototype routes underperformed the S5 mean/std baseline: slot views reached identity/pair 0.442073/0.350859, all-cross views reached 0.443991/0.352414, versus mean/std 0.461553/0.360210. Eval-only retrieval audit also favored S5 mean OSNet over all-cross max: AP 0.430425 vs 0.372521 and cross positive margin 0.788167 vs 0.685156. Close this prototype aggregation route; next no-anchor branch should change identity evidence source or weak-label curriculum rather than aggregate the same OSNet crops harder.

Distilled the Deli AutoResearch/self-play thread into the current no-anchor loop as ready-means-execute: run concrete proxy candidates through canonical DS1 full-score instead of stopping at a queue. Then full-scored referee-pruned crossqueue/single-edge localized-island ranks 1-4 on h100-test-3. The proxy predicted full IDF1 0.662361-0.666790 with pair F1 around 0.769, but actual canonical IDF1/HOTA/AssA were rank1 0.650714/0.514125/0.529500, rank2 0.626798/0.494799/0.518994, rank3 0.624978/0.492621/0.516447, and rank4 0.625017/0.492936/0.517068, all below the current best 0.655911/0.519311/0.534922. The large 3->68 move causes severe DS1 side effects despite high pair F1. Close this old-base crossqueue component-reassignment family and pivot structurally to stronger no-anchor weak-label curriculum or new identity evidence with hard negatives from these failed moves.

Ran stricter no-anchor BoTSORT sample curriculum/top-k ablations after the crossqueue DS1 refutation. The key discovery was not the learned pair model but baseline time_agglom with top_k=15 and theta=0.035: sample identity F1 reached 0.702092 and pair F1/P/R reached 0.639093/0.607764/0.673829, correcting the prior S5 mean/std plateau 0.461553 identity and 0.360210 pair F1. Three curriculum variants all selected the same no-training baseline row, so the gain is a resolver search-space discovery. A direct DS1 migration probe with time_agglom top_k=15 theta 0.025-0.045 was negative: fast pair F1 peaked at 0.612019 with P/R 0.782720/0.502443, and canonical full IDF1/HOTA/AssA peaked at 0.587838/0.444591/0.463460, far below the current no-anchor best 0.655911/0.519311/0.534922. Promote the sample insight as a precision-biased candidate generator, but refute full-resolver replacement on DS1.

Distilled the Deli AutoResearch thread into a stricter execute-and-referee loop, then evaluated DS1 time_agglom top_k15 only as a local attach generator on top of the current no-anchor best. Corrected the comparable eval path to assignment CSV -> full submission zip -> density_simple sourcezip -> p005 area, and discarded a DATA_ROOT-missing empty-HOTA attempt. Four single attach candidates were scored. rank08 moved seq 4973 from component 58 to 55 and promoted e2e IDF1/HOTA/AssA to 0.655948/0.519356/0.534962 from 0.655911/0.519311/0.534922. rank09/rank10/rank11 scored 0.655898/0.655843/0.655805 IDF1 and are near-miss hard negatives. This is a micro-promotion and a side-effect-critic dataset, not a 0.70 breakthrough.

Added no-GT temporal/namespace features and explicit critic/hybrid ranking to the top_k15 time-agglom attach generator. On the rank08 base, a relaxed 21-candidate pool produced new verified micro-gains: critic rank04 reached 0.656068 IDF1, rank05 reached 0.655963, and combo 4+5 reached the new no-anchor e2e best 0.656083/0.519553/0.535174. The hand critic itself is refuted as an ordering function because rank01/rank03 were hard negatives while rank04 was under-ranked. Use the accumulated positives/hard negatives to train a calibrated tiny attach ranker, then generate a larger candidate pool from the combo 4+5 base.

Distilled the Deli AutoResearch/self-play protocol into the no-anchor loop, then trained a tiny ridge attach ranker from verified local-edit full-score labels. Candidate pools oldbase/rank08base/combo45base had 70/69/67 raw candidates. The ranker LOOCV was weak (corr 0.035787, MAE 0.000061451), but top selected edit 382+2821+7262->2329 moved 3 tracklets and promoted canonical p005-area IDF1/HOTA/AssA to 0.656141/0.519617/0.535233 from previous 0.656083/0.519553/0.535174. Ranks 2/3/4 scored p005 IDF1 0.655980/0.656133/0.656049. This confirms a small no-anchor scheduling signal but not enough to approach 0.70.

Three rolling no-anchor learned attach ranker iterations produced a verified micro-chain: combo 4+5 base 0.656083 -> roll1 382+2821+7262->2329 at 0.656141 -> roll2 9202->15 at 0.656193 -> roll3 6960->10 at 0.656225 IDF1. HOTA/AssA for the final best are 0.519723/0.535329. Roll3 improved MCAM06 Tc6 to IDF1 0.610296 and MCAM08 Tc6 to 0.769911, but MCAM04 Tc6 remains 0.562439. The marginal gains are real but too small for the 0.70 goal; stop blind ridge roll4 and build a side-effect/per-video gate or pivot to higher-mass evidence.

Built side-effect labels from 12 verified no-anchor local attach full-score edits and trained a tiny ridge side-effect gate. Diagnostics refuted the regressor as a production scheduler: global delta LOOCV corr was -0.481683, MCAM04 and MCAM06 were also anti-correlated, only MCAM08 was positive. Single-edit near-misses scored below the current best, and four side-effect combos also failed to beat roll3 rank04. The best corrected combo was 9487->33 + 2681->28 at p005 IDF1/HOTA/AssA 0.656200/0.519692/0.535294, still below the current 0.656225/0.519723/0.535329. A metric hygiene issue was caught and fixed: earlier rank02-04 p005 runs had an assignment path as config_name, so I wrote p005_area_config.txt on h100-test-3 and reran corrected p005 metrics. Conclusion: side-effect gate v1 is a useful label-producing refutation, not a promotion. Next should build richer per-video/undo side-effect labels or pivot to higher-mass component evidence, especially MCAM04.

Fed side-effect V1 single/combo outcomes back into the no-anchor side-effect label bank, increasing labels to 20, then trained a V2 MCAM04-weighted gate and scored the top four new candidates. V2 improved MCAM04 LOOCV corr to 0.260832 but global delta LOOCV remained anti-correlated at -0.256258. Canonical p005 scoring with the new guard produced no promotion: 6797->9 exactly tied the current best at IDF1/HOTA/AssA 0.656225/0.519723/0.535329, 1811+6864->46 scored 0.656182, 313->21 scored 0.656158, and 6234->17 scored 0.656214. This is a near-tie refutation of local attach-only side-effect iteration; pivot to high-mass component rollback/split and MCAM04 structural evidence.

Tested explicit no-anchor MCAM04 tracklet-level area admission on the current best roll3 rank04 assignment. The exporter generated six geometry-only policies without loading GT; the two mildest policies were canonical full-scored. mcam04_area2600 dropped 54 MCAM04 tracklets and scored p005 IDF1/HOTA/AssA 0.655613/0.519060/0.534957, while mcam04_area3000 dropped 91 and scored 0.655421/0.518834/0.534811, both below the standing 0.656225/0.519723/0.535329. MCAM04 DetPr rose and AssA rose slightly, but DetRe and IDF1 fell, so low-area tracklet pruning is the wrong lever. Stopped the more aggressive 3200-4800 sweeps and recorded this as a Deli-style honest negative ablation; pivot to recall-preserving structural/subpart conflict repair.

Recall-guarded subpart repair promoted a new no-anchor e2e best without dropping tracklets. The relaxed rank01 edit moved six MCAM04 Tc6 tracklets from component 8 to 40 and improved canonical p005-area IDF1/HOTA/AssA from 0.656225/0.519723/0.535329 to 0.656453/0.519993/0.535718. The gain is small but structurally useful: MCAM04 IDF1 improved from 0.562439 to 0.563063 through DetRe 0.476722 -> 0.477831 while other focus videos stayed unchanged. Strict rank01 and relaxed ranks 2/4 were weaker positive/negative ablations. Continue with compatible subpart combinations and a side-effect label bank; e2e remains below 0.70.

Composed verified no-anchor subpart repairs from the current-best manifest and full-scored three canonical p005 combos. rank01+rank02 improved p005 IDF1/HOTA/AssA to 0.656548/0.520126/0.535863. rank01+rank04 was weaker at 0.656468/0.519934/0.535572, showing rank04 is association-risky. rank01+rank02+rank04 became the new IDF1 best at 0.656563/0.520067/0.535717, a +0.000110 IDF1 gain over the previous 0.656453. The result proves subpart repair is weakly compositional, but the gain remains far below the 0.70 e2e goal; next build a side-effect-aware subpart combo ranker/referee before spending on lower-margin rank05 candidates.

evidence.scorer_hygiene_fix: run_no_anchor_density_area_pipeline now defaults DATA_ROOT to /mnt/localssd/vlincs_reid_data and no_anchor_pervideo_filter_selector supports explicit --skip-score for export-only density filtering

finding: Targeted no-anchor subpart repair on top of the current combo best found a larger MCAM04 Tc6 positive edit. balanced rank01 35->60 moved 14 MCAM04 tracklets and improved canonical p005 IDF1/HOTA/AssA from 0.656563/0.520067/0.535717 to 0.657475/0.520599/0.535769. MCAM04 IDF1 improved 0.563103->0.565121 with DetPr 0.685295->0.688037 and DetRe 0.477892->0.479465, while AssA slightly decreased on that slice. 35->60 20-tracklet variants remained positive but weaker; 55->58 variants were strong negatives, and cross-video 2329->40 was a broad negative. This creates a useful side-effect label bank and a new e2e best, still below 0.70.
